{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Horizon's fabricators
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has upgraded fabricators.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“You were vital to our preparations, and Horizon’s upgraded fabricators were all that allowed us to stand our ground, but you served virtually no use in this fight.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
